REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RICKY LAM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 23, 2015. OPPOSING PARTY'S SEPARATE STATEMENT OF MATERIAL FACTS FAILS TO CITE TO ANY EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF ITS CONTENTIONS THAT CERTAIN FACTS ARE DISPUTED, IN VIOLATION OF CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1350. THIS DEPRIVES THE COURT OF THE ABILITY TO CONSIDER THE SEPARATE STATEMENT. (SEE PARKVIEW VILLAS ASS'N INC. V. STATE FARM FIRE AND CAS. CO. (2005) 133 CAL.APP.4TH 1197, 1211.) OPPOSING PARTY SHALL FILE WITH THE COURT AN AMENDED SEPARATE STATEMENT WHICH COMPLIES WITH ALL THE REQUIREMENTS OF CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1350(F) BY APRIL 16, 2015. DEFENDANT MAY THEN FILE AN AMENDED RESPONSE, IF IT WISHES, BY APRIL 20, 2015. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE FOR RESCHEDULING THE HEARING DATE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF TRIAL UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 437C(A). FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350 AND THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WILL RESULT IN THE MOTION BEING GRANTED. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT RICKY LAM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is CONTINUED to April 23, 2015. Opposing Party's Separate Statement of Material Facts fails to cite to any evidence in support of its contentions that certain facts are disputed, in violation of California Rule of Court 3.1350. This deprives the Court of the ability to consider the Separate Statement. (See Parkview Villas Ass'n Inc. v. State Farm Fire and Cas. Co. (2005) 133 Cal.App.4th 1197, 1211.) Opposing party shall file with the court an amended Separate Statement which complies with all the requirements of California Rule of Court 3.1350(f) by April 16, 2015. Defendant may then file an amended response, if it wishes, by April 20, 2015. The Court finds good cause for rescheduling the hearing date within 30 days of trial under Code of Civil Procedure Section 437c(a). Failure to comply with CRC 3.1350 and the Court's tentative ruling will result in the motion being granted. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
